subcodes.first_line: O ye two sincere servants of the True One, and ye two steadfast upholders of the Covenant, and ye two Hands of the Cause of the luminous horizon, gird up the loins of endeavour [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بنده صادق حق و دو ناصر میثاق و دو ایادی امر نیر آفاق کمر همت را در
subcodes.subjects: @Ascension of Baha'u'llah, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @suffering and imprisonment, @call to action, @Hands of the Cause, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
